languages.text: Созданный Эоганном триединый праведник сбежал из Сектора Бионика, устремившись на нижние палубы. Вольному Торговцу нужно найти его и решить как поступить со сбежавшим экспериментом.
The righteous Triasomata created by Eogunn has escaped from the Sector Bionica, making his way to the lower decks. The Rogue Trader must find him and decide what to do with the runaway subject.
languages.original_text: Созданный Эоганном триединый праведник сбежал из Сектора Бионика, устремившись на нижние палубы. Вольному Торговцу нужно найти его и решить как поступить со сбежавшим экспериментом.

traits.locale_text: The righteous Triasomata created by Eogunn has escaped from the Sector Bionica, making his way to the lower decks. The Rogue Trader must find him and decide what to do with the runaway subject.
The righteous Triasomata created by Eogunn has escaped from the Sector Bionica, making his way to the lower decks. The Rogue Trader must find him and decide what to do with the runaway subject.
The righteous Triasomata created by Eogunn has escaped from the Sector Bionica, making his way to the lower decks. The Rogue Trader must find him and decide what to do with the runaway subject.

languages.text: エオガンによって作られた正義のトライアスモータがセクター・ビオニカから脱出し、下層デッキへと向かっている。ローグ・トレーダーは彼を見つけ、逃走した被験者への処置を決めなければならない。
languages.original_text: The righteous Triasomata created by Eogunn has escaped from the Sector Bionica, making his way to the lower decks. The Rogue Trader must find him and decide what to do with the runaway subject.

traits.locale_text: エオグンによって作られた正義のトライアスモータがセクター・ビオニカから脱出し、下層デッキへと向かっている。ローグ・トレーダーは彼を見つけ、逃走した被験者への処置を決めなければならない。

languages.text: 伊奥贡创造的正义三相体已逃离仿生区，去往下层甲板。行商浪人必须找到他，并决定如何处理这个逃跑的实验体。
languages.original_text: The righteous Triasomata created by Eogunn has escaped from the Sector Bionica, making his way to the lower decks. The Rogue Trader must find him and decide what to do with the runaway subject.

traits.locale_text: 伊奥贡创造的正义三相体已逃离仿生区，去往下层甲板。行商浪人必须找到他，并决定如何处理这个逃跑的实验体。

languages.text: Le Triasomata vertueux créé par Eogunn s'est échappé du secteur Bionica et se dirige vers les ponts inférieurs. {mf|Le libre-marchand|La libre-marchande} doit trouver le fugitif et décider de ce qu'il adviendra de lui.
languages.original_text: The righteous Triasomata created by Eogunn has escaped from the Sector Bionica, making his way to the lower decks. The Rogue Trader must find him and decide what to do with the runaway subject.

traits.locale_text: Le Triasomata vertueux créé par Eogunn s'est échappé du secteur Bionica et se dirige vers les ponts inférieurs. {mf|Le libre-marchand|La libre-marchande} doit trouver le fugitif et décider de ce qu'il adviendra de lui.

languages.text: El virtuoso triasómata que creó Eogunn ha escapado del sector Bionica y ha llegado hasta las cubiertas inferiores. {mf|El|La} Comerciante Independiente debe encontrarlo y decidir qué hacer con el sujeto fugado.
languages.original_text: The righteous Triasomata created by Eogunn has escaped from the Sector Bionica, making his way to the lower decks. The Rogue Trader must find him and decide what to do with the runaway subject.

traits.locale_text: El virtuoso triasómata que creó Eogunn ha escapado del sector Bionica y ha llegado hasta las cubiertas inferiores. {mf|El|La} Comerciante Independiente debe encontrarlo y decidir qué hacer con el sujeto fugado.

languages.text: Eogunn'un yarattığı doğruluk timsali Üçyeköz, Sektör Biyonika'dan kaçarak alt güvertelere indi. Hür Tacir onu bulmalı ve kaçak deneğe ne yapılacağına karar vermeli.
languages.original_text: The righteous Triasomata created by Eogunn has escaped from the Sector Bionica, making his way to the lower decks. The Rogue Trader must find him and decide what to do with the runaway subject.

traits.locale_text: Eogunn'un yarattığı doğruluk timsali Üçyeköz, Sektör Biyonika'dan kaçarak alt güvertelere indi. Hür Tacir onu bulmalı ve kaçak deneğe ne yapılacağına karar vermeli.

languages.text: Der von Eogunn geschaffene rechtschaffene Triasomata ist aus dem Sektor Bionica geflohen und auf dem Weg zu den unteren Decks. {mf|Der Freihändler|Die Freihändlerin} muss ihn finden und entscheiden, was mit ihm geschehen soll.
languages.original_text: The righteous Triasomata created by Eogunn has escaped from the Sector Bionica, making his way to the lower decks. The Rogue Trader must find him and decide what to do with the runaway subject.
